examples: The greatest monarch on the proudest throne is obliged to sit upon his own arse.
He sits on his arse all day doing nothing.
Every last crooked rock of the place had at some point seated the bony arse of some hypochondriacal epiphany-seeker.
On the popular ABC debate programme QandA, a panellist observed that Julia Gillard wore unflattering jackets and had a "fat arse".
